description: Perfect Accessories: The best gift for your lovely baby. With this baby beanie they'll be even cuter. These baby winter hat have several different basic colours and styles to match your newborn baby in Autumn, Winter, Home, Travel, Birthday, Thanksgiving, Christmas and so on. Comfortable Fabric: Newborn baby knit hat is made of 100% high quality acrylic material. comfortable and soft, warm, breathable. Unique and Cute: The knit hat keeps baby head and ears warm in cold weather. And your baby hats have the perfect elastic tape design to better suit your baby's daily activities. The elasticity of the beanie allows it to fits most babies, newborns, toddlers, little girls, little boys. Occasions: Baby beanie hats, enjoy extra warmth, keeps your head and ear warm in the cold day. Beautiful colours, you can choose any dress to match your favourite. Suitable for any daily wear and winter outdoor activities. Material : 100% Acrylic Size : 0-12 Months
